title: Ongoing Steel Production Growth Outside Of China
section_path: Ongoing Steel Production Growth Outside Of China
section_path_text: Ongoing Steel Production Growth Outside Of China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Dry Bulk Report, global steel production totaled approximately 152.8 million tons in July. This is down month-on-month by 8.6 million tons (-5%) and is 5.7 million tons (-4%) less than was reported last year for July 2023's production. Steel production outside of China totaled approximately 69.9 million tons last month.
